resolved_facts.fact: 2025 net income was $1.340 billion and operating cash flow was $1.121 billion.
NVR controlled approximately 169,250 LPA lots with $920.1 million cash deposits; normal legal loss is generally limited to deposits.
Gross contract-land deposits were $962.416 million and the allowance was $110.958 million after $75.9 million of 2025 impairment charges.

disputed_facts.issue: The valuation component ranges are analyst estimates, not values reproduced by the cited primary facts.

unresolved_material_facts: No community-level cycle history reproduces the owner-earnings range.
No lot-level exercise/opening schedule supports incremental option value without overlap.
No disclosed stress-liquidity policy proves the surplus-cash range.
